sensory_synthesis.interpretation: The system is experiencing high drift and inconsistent current readings, which could indicate a navigation error. The battery level is high, so power is not an immediate concern. The shallow depth and low navigation error suggest the system is close to the intended location. The slow velocity and low waypoint suggest the system is not actively moving towards the next waypoint.
